diff.new_value: Statistics Agency SIAT annual GDP data, calculated YoY

Calculated from SIAT sdmx_data_582 national aggregate Code 1700 annual GDP prior-year index for 2025: 107.7 minus 100. Previous value uses 2024 index 106.7 minus 100. Methodology: https://lib.stat.uz/ru/features-3/natsionalnye-scheta/622-yalpi-ichki-mahsulotni-ishlab-chiqarish-usulida-hisoblash-bo-yicha-uslubiy-nizom-3.

old_value: Preliminary annual national accounts release; owner verification is still required before public export.
previous_value 6.7 is the 2024 annual real GDP growth rate shown in the same Statistics Agency annual GDP release.
new_value: SIAT 582 reports annual GDP growth rates as prior-year=100 index values; Overview stores index minus 100.
SIAT 582 metadata note: for 2024 preliminary data.
